name: 深海迷航
descr:
Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A massive, open world full of wonder and peril awaits you![h2]Dive Into a Vast Underwater World[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20161220_Steam_Inline_Shallows.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

You have crash-landed on an alien ocean world, and the only way to go is down. Subnautica's oceans range from sun drenched shallow coral reefs to treacherous deep-sea trenches, lava fields, and bio-luminescent underwater rivers. Manage your oxygen supply as you explore kelp forests, plateaus, reefs, and winding cave systems. The water teems with life: Some of it helpful, much of it harmful.[h2]Scavenge, Craft, and Survive[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20141216_Steam_Inline_DamagedPod.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

After crash landing in your Life Pod, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and to develop the equipment you need to explore. Collect resources from the ocean around you. Craft diving gear, lights, habitat modules, and submersibles. Venture deeper and further form to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items.[h2]Construct Underwater Habitats[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20161220_Steam_Inline_Base.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

Build bases on the sea floor. Choose layouts and components, and manage hull-integrity as depth and pressure increase. Use your base to store resources, park vehicles, and replenish oxygen supplies as you explore the vast ocean.[h2]Unravel the Mystery[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20170403_SN_Steam_Inline_Mystery.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

What happened to this planet? Signs abound that something is not right. What caused you to crash? What is infecting the sea life? Who built the mysterious structures scattered around the ocean? Can you find a way to make it off the planet alive?[h2]Disrupt the Food Chain[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20161220_Steam_Inline_FoodChain.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

The ocean teems with life: Use the ecosystem to help you. Lure and distract a threatening creature with a fresh fish, or simply swim as fast as you can to avoid gnashing jaws of roaming predators.[h2]Handle the Pressure[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/steamexosuit.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

Build a Pressure Re-Active Waterproof Nanosuit, or PRAWN Suit, and explore extreme depth and heat. Modify the suit with mining drills, torpedo launchers, propulsion cannons, grappling hooks and more.[h2]Fear the Night[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20161220_Steam_Inline_Night.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

As the sun goes down, the predators come out. The ocean is unforgiving of those caught unprepared in the darkness. Areas that are safe to explore during the day become treacherous at night, but also reveal a beauty that those who hide from the darkness will never see.[h2]Dive Below the Ocean Floor[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20170403_SN_Steam_Inline_LostRiver.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

Cave systems wind below the sea bed, from dark claustrophobic passages to caverns lit by bio-luminescent life and burning-hot lava flows. Explore the world below the ocean floor, but watch your oxygen levels, and take care to avoid the threats lurking in the darkness.[h2]Open Development[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20170403_SN_Steam_Inline_Cyclops.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

[url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=355026171]Get weekly or daily updates,[/url] see [url=https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftrello.com%2Fb%2FyxoJrFgP%2Fsubnautica]what the development team is working on,[/url] view [url=https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=http%3A%2F%2Fsubnautica.unknownworlds.com%2F%23%2Fsubnautica%2Ffeedback]real time change logs,[/url] and give feedback [url=http://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=356376081]from inside the game.[/url] Subnautica Early Access development is open, and the development team wants to hear from you.[h2]About the Development Team[/h2][img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20150416_Subnautica_Steam_Inline_UWE.jpg?t=1700522118[/img]

Subnautica is being created by Unknown Worlds, a small studio founded by [url=http://twitter.com/flayra]Charlie Cleveland[/url] and [url=http://twitter.com/max_mcguire]Max McGuire[/url] that traces its roots back to the 2003 Half-Life mod Natural Selection. The team is scattered around the globe, from the United States to the United Kingdom, France, the Czech Republic, Russia, Thailand, Australia, and many more places. There is a central office in San Francisco, California that serves as home base for the whole team.

[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/HeadingDivider.png?t=1700522118[/img]
[img]https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/264710/extras/20170403_SN_Steam_Inline_SafeHole.jpg?t=1700522118[/img][h2]Warning[/h2]
This game contains flashing lights that may make it unsuitable for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitive conditions. Player discretion is advised.

【配置需求】

Windows
最低配置:
需要 64 位处理器和操作系统
操作系统 *: Windows Vista SP2 or newer, 64-bit
处理器: Intel Haswell 2 cores / 4 threads @ 2.5Ghz or equivalent
内存: 4 GB RAM
显卡: Intel HD 4600 or equivalent - This includes most GPUs scoring greater than 950 points in the
3DMark Fire Strike benchmark
DirectX 版本: 11
存储空间: 需要 20 GB 可用空间
支持 VR: SteamVR. Keyboard or gamepad required
推荐配置:
需要 64 位处理器和操作系统
操作系统 *: Windows Vista SP2 or newer, 64-bit
处理器: Intel Haswell 4 cores / 4 threads @ 3.2Ghz or equivalent
内存: 8 GB RAM
显卡: Nvidia GTX 550 Ti or equivalent, 2GB VRAM
DirectX 版本: 11
存储空间: 需要 20 GB 可用空间
*
2024 年 1 月 1 日（PT）起，Steam 客户端将仅支持 Windows 10 及更新版本。

Mac OS X
最低配置:
操作系统: OS X 10.9 Mavericks
处理器: Intel Haswell 2 cores / 4 threads @ 2.5Ghz or equivalent
内存: 4 GB RAM
显卡: Intel HD 4600 or equivalent
存储空间: 需要 20 GB 可用空间
推荐配置:
操作系统: OS X 10.9 Mavericks
处理器: Intel Haswell 4 cores / 4 threads @ 3.2Ghz or equivalent
内存: 8 GB RAM
显卡: Nvidia GTX 550 Ti or equivalent, 2GB VRAM
存储空间: 需要 20 GB 可用空间
